  <script>
    (function () {
      try {
        var saved = localStorage.getItem('cp64-theme');
        var theme = saved || (window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: light)').matches ? 'light' : 'dark');
        if (theme === 'light') document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', 'light');
      } catch (e) { /* localStorage blocked */ }
    })();
  </script>

Home / Supported games

Game Save Backup Guides

Last updated 2026-07-02

Checkpoint64 automatically backs up your game saves and keeps every version, so a corrupted, overwritten, or mod-broken save is one click from being restored. It ships with presets for 75+ games and 7 emulators, so it already knows where each save folder lives.

Below are the in-depth guides — where the saves are stored, how they break, and how to roll them back. Don't see your game? If it writes its save to a folder on disk, Checkpoint64 can back it up; point it at the folder and go.

  • Skyrim

    Skyrim Special Edition saves live in one folder and one bad mod change can brick them. Checkpoint64 keeps every version of your .ess saves so a broken load order is one click from undone. Free download.

  • Minecraft

    A single corrupted region file can wipe a Minecraft world you've built for months. Checkpoint64 backs up your saves folder automatically and keeps every version, so a broken chunk is one click from restored. Free download for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

  • Satisfactory

    Satisfactory factories represent hundreds of hours, and a bad redesign or a corrupted autosave can undo them. Checkpoint64 keeps every version of your .sav files so you can experiment and roll back. Free download.

  • Valheim

    Valheim keeps each world as a .db and .fwl pair, and co-op groups constantly lose track of the newest copy. Checkpoint64 keeps every version with version locks, so one canonical world moves forward. Free download for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

  • Stardew Valley

    Stardew Valley's Steam Cloud sync can force a blind choice between two conflicting saves, and a bad SMAPI mod update can break the one you keep. Checkpoint64 keeps every version of your farm so you're never guessing. Free download for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

  • Elden Ring

    Elden Ring's Steam Cloud sync has a well-documented history of corrupting saves, and there's no official way to undo New Game+. Checkpoint64 keeps every version of your .sl2 so a bad sync or a big commitment is one click from undone. Free download.

  • Palworld

    Palworld's Level.sav only grows as your world ages, and a crash or bad shutdown mid-save is a well-known way to corrupt it. Checkpoint64 keeps every version so a bad save is one click from restored. Free download.

  • Factorio

    A 200-hour Factorio base is one bad mod update or one crashed autosave away from gone. Checkpoint64 keeps every version of your save — megabases included — so a disaster is one click from undone. Free download for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

  • Don't Starve Together

    Don't Starve Together runs a hidden server even when you play solo, and a crash mid-autosave can corrupt the world you've survived hundreds of days in. Checkpoint64 keeps every version so a bad save is one click from restored. Free download for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

  • 7 Days to Die

    7 Days to Die saves routinely stop working across major version updates, and a corrupted region can cost a horde-night base. Checkpoint64 keeps every version so an update or a bad region is one click from undone. Free download for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

  • Sons of the Forest

    Sons of the Forest keeps one live save per world, and whoever's hosting is the only copy that matters. Checkpoint64 keeps every version so a crash or a bad session doesn't cost the base you've built. Free download.

  • Enshrouded

    Enshrouded supports an official dedicated server for full-time co-op, but Checkpoint64 covers most of the same need for a small group at a fraction of the cost — plus version history a rented server doesn't give you. Free download.

Never lose a save again

Automatic backups and full version history. Free download for Windows, macOS, and Linux.
